title: taraxacum marginiferum
intro: Taraxacum marginiferum, also known as the crested dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of taraxasterol, a triterpenoid compound that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum marginiferum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support liver health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various conditions. Taraxacum marginiferum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
